t-1.notes: feature: phase ship/completion handoff · Ship @ internal/cmd/ship.go · ship folds the completed-state transition into the phase branch so the squash-merge carries it to main

t-2.notes: feature: phase ship/completion handoff · phaseComplete @ internal/cmd/phase.go · complete is ff + branch-delete only, guarded by origin's completion record — writes no commit to main

t-3.notes: feature: phase ship/completion handoff · TestConsecutivePhasesNoDivergence @ internal/cmd/phase_test.go · proves two back-to-back ship→squash→complete cycles leave local main == origin/main (no re-seeded divergence)
